misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, representing Revontuli Golf, has carved a distinctive presence within the demanding landscape of the Hector Trophée. His consistent involvement, marked by eight appearances in this unique pairs competition, speaks volumes of his unwavering commitment and deep appreciation for the tournament's spirit and challenges.

Across his numerous campaigns, Janne has approached the intricate formats with earnest dedication, though the ultimate triumph of securing either the coveted Hector Trophée alongside a partner or the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has, as yet, remained an aspiration. His journey is often punctuated by a charming navigational style; Janne is known to occasionally embark on unexpected detours across the expansive golf course grounds, adding a unique, meandering dimension to his competitive rounds.

Beyond the competitive scores, Janne's character shines brightly. He is widely regarded for his exceptional generosity and an uncompromising integrity, encapsulated by the maxim that he 'does not spit in the glass.' This speaks to a profound respect for fair play, camaraderie, and the shared experience of the Hector Trophée, enriching the event with his presence far beyond his scorecard.

While Janne will, regrettably, not be among the competitors gracing the fairways for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, marking a temporary pause in his storied involvement, his continued active status in Hector events signals an anticipated return. The golfing community awaits the next chapter of this dedicated and singularly affable competitor's quest for glory.
